tasks.label: Go out to the club with the friend group

memory.summary: Mina and Jae are inviting me to Echo, but I have a midterm tomorrow. With only 40% of my review done and high stress, staying home seems more productive than going out.
I missed the club invitation but Mina is leaving now. With only 2 hours of study done and high stress, I must prioritize finishing my midterm review tonight.
I declined Mina's Echo invitation. With a midterm tomorrow and low energy, staying home to study remains my best option.
Midterm review progress improved from 0.78 to 0.92 after two hours, confirming that staying home is the most effective strategy given my current stress and energy levels.
Good sleep restored my energy to 10.0, confirming that rest supports the effective study strategy I've been using.
Midterm starts now with study progress at 1.00. Since work is done and I'm rested, I can relax.
The club welcomed me warmly after joining, confirming social interaction is possible now that my midterm preparation is complete.
